subject: session date
fact: The session took place on May 10th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 10th, 2026

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A Mezzaloth lashed out at Daein with a trident but every strike sailed wide.
source_quote: The cruel Yugoloth lashed out at Daein with its trident... yet every strike sailed wide

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth vanished and reappeared across the battlefield to avoid Bramgrim's protective spirits.
source_quote: Unwilling to linger within range of Bramgrim's protective spirits, the creature vanished in an instant and reappeared across the battlefield

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth conjured a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog.
source_quote: a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog conjured by the Mezzaloth

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's concentration broke under the assault, causing his protective spirits to dissolve.
source_quote: Bramgrim, whose concentration finally broke under the relentless assault, causing his protective spirits to dissolve into nothing

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting.
source_quote: He pushed through the pain, summoning a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic but failed.
source_quote: attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic — but the cloud held

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear.
source_quote: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maintained concentration on an invisible Wall of Force between the party and enemy forces.
source_quote: Felkur who quietly bore the greatest burden of all, maintaining his concentration on the invisible Wall of Force

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used a moment's respite to catch his breath and recover his strength.
source_quote: Daein used a moment's respite to catch his breath and recover his strength

subject: fire bolt
fact: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth.
source_quote: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth staggered from the fire bolt and the impact scattered the poisonous cloud.
source_quote: The creature, resistant to flame though it was, still staggered from the blow, and the impact was enough to scatter the poisonous cloud at last

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with dispelling magic but failed.
source_quote: attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with a burst of dispelling magic — and failed

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth teleported away in desperation.
source_quote: It teleported away in desperation

subject: Mezzaloth death
fact: Daein cut the Mezzaloth down before it could escape.
source_quote: Daein was already moving, cutting the creature down before it could escape

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths emerged in the chaos screaming for reinforcements.
source_quote: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths had emerged in the chaos, screaming for reinforcements

subject: Fire Giant
fact: Two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall.
source_quote: two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall

subject: Fire Giant attacks
fact: The Fire Giants hurled themselves at Daein and missed every single strike.
source_quote: the giants hurled themselves at Daein again and again, and again and again, they missed — every single strike falling short

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy.
source_quote: a second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy

subject: wand of disintegration
fact: A second Mezzaloth pressed a wand crackling with disintegrating energy against the Wall of Force.
source_quote: pressed the wand against the Wall of Force

subject: Wall of Force destruction
fact: The Wall of Force barrier ceased to exist after being pressed by the wand.
source_quote: the barrier that had protected the party for five brutal rounds simply ceased to exist

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: One of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: one of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maintained concentration on the Wall of Force despite the fireball and other assaults.
source_quote: Felkur, who had held his concentration through poison, fire, and the relentless pressure of battle, held it still

subject: party teleportation
fact: The party teleported away leaving the Mezzaloth's corpse and a furious army behind.
source_quote: The party seized their moment and teleported away, leaving the Mezzaloth's corpse and a furious army behind them

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party materialized in Sporedome.
source_quote: They materialized in Sporedome

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rushed out to greet the party.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet the party.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Brandyr
fact: Drow assistants took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant.
source_quote: Drow assistants carefully took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant

subject: Fire Giant ritual
fact: Brandyr was moved to a nearby chamber to begin a ritual Solom had long prepared.
source_quote: moved the enormous creature to a nearby chamber to begin the ritual Solom had long prepared

subject: ritual duration
fact: The ritual to process Brandyr would take ten days to complete.
source_quote: explained that the process would take ten days to complete

subject: party decision
fact: The party decided to stay in Sporedome instead of returning to Hillsfar.
source_quote: they decided to stay in Sporedome instead

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Solom assured the party he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: assured them he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas refined her archery instincts and ability to fire through cover.
source_quote: Akritas refined her archery instincts, sharpening her ability to fire through cover

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim deepened his divine connection and gained a new radiant prayer.
source_quote: Bramgrim deepened his divine connection, gaining a steadier hand for maintaining his sacred wards and adding a new radiant prayer to his arsenal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mused about engineering a device to reshape his elemental attacks.
source_quote: Felkur mused aloud about engineering a device that could reshape the very nature of his elemental attacks

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was identified as a figure of legend, a phantom thief no one could name.
source_quote: Felkur was now, technically, a figure of legend — a phantom thief no one could name

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur asked if he could sell the merchandise.
source_quote: could he sell the merchandise

subject: future battle
fact: Solom reminded the party that while this was a great victory, the battle was far from over.
source_quote: reminded them gravely that while this had been a great victory, the battle was far from over
